claimBoundary: Context-packing scaffold only. Sample evidence cards are illustrative and not benchmark evidence; canClaimAGI=false.

summary.text: Illustrative card showing how a source-evidence channel preserves the claim that verifier gates, not model outputs alone, govern promotion.
preservedClaims: Verifier gates are required before promoted factual claims.
The scaffold does not declare model capability.
knownLimits: This card is illustrative and has not been used in a benchmark run.
No model has been trained or evaluated by this manifest.

reasons: Illustrative sample, not a validated evidence artifact.

sampleEvidenceCards.claimBoundary: Illustrative context-packing card only; not evidence of model performance and canClaimAGI=false.

excluded: source text without license or provenance metadata
promotionRule: Only accepted cards with source ids, verifier reasons, and eval-disjoint provenance can support future candidate evidence. Held, rejected, and abstain cards may train uncertainty habits but cannot support a capability claim.
